title: Roguecraft To Go
description: Modpack with Roguecraft all set up to go!
body:
THIS MODPACK IS ARCHIVED AS REQUESTED BY MONOCODE!
Use the official modpack for Roguecraft from now on:
https://modrinth.com/modpack/roguecraft-official

If you decide to use this, do not contact MonoCode or ask for support in his server regarding this outdated modpack.



Modpack ready to go to play Roguecraft.
Contains many optimization and compatibility mods.
Roguecraft world is ready to go, just join the world and play.
e4mc is included so you do not need a server.
